name: ExtensionPaymentReconciliation_ReturnedAmount
title: R5: Amount returned by the receiver (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` 0..1 `Money`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` 0..1 `Money`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` has a context of PaymentReconciliation based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PaymentReconciliation`.
Element `PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Amount returned by the receiver (new)
element.comment:
Element `PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` has a context of PaymentReconciliation based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PaymentReconciliation`.
Element `PaymentReconciliation.returnedAmount` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The amount returned by the receiver which is excess to the amount payable, often referred to as 'change'.
